headline: Is It Time To Reassess ResMed (RMD) After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether ResMed at around US$219.85 is starting to look like value or still pricing in a lot of optimism, you are in the right place. The share price has had a mixed run, with a 3.6% decline over the last 7 days, a 2.9% decline over 30 days, and returns of 10.2% lower year to date and 6.0% lower over the last year, even though the 5 year return sits at 22.1%. That pattern of pressure over shorter periods alongside a positive 5 year result can leave investors questioning...
